banner.title: Membership
banner.desc: BitVoy, more freely. A membership system where the more you participate, the more value expands.

diamond.title: 🟦 Diamond Founder
diamond.description:
Diamond Founder is the highest tier of the Founder Membership.

Experience the growth of BitVoy from the closest position and receive maximum access to all benefits and privileges.
diamond.benefit1Description: Top-priority access to exclusive events provides opportunities for special secret experiences.
diamond.benefit2Description: BVC cashback is applied at the maximum level for transactions and payments.
diamond.benefit3Description: Access to the top-tier draw pool within the Founder-exclusive gacha.
diamond.benefit4Description: For BitVoy tokens and airdrops, you are prioritized at the maximum allocation level.
diamond.benefit5Description: For RWA benefits such as trading cards, events, and experiences, top-priority listing on markets and wanted lists is provided.
diamond.benefit6Title: Voting rights on project direction and partners: Maximum
diamond.benefit6Description: In votes regarding project direction and partner selection, you can participate with the highest level of influence.
diamond.benefit7Title: Exclusive Diamond title and badge display
diamond.benefit7Description: Diamond Founder-exclusive titles and badges are displayed on your profile, marketplace, and in the community.
diamond.recommended1: Those who want to use BitVoy as a core service
diamond.recommended2: Those who don't want to miss any benefits or priority access

platinum.title: 🟪 Platinum Founder
platinum.description:
Platinum Founder is a premium tier that balances strong benefits with accessibility.

Enjoy core Founder benefits while experiencing the evolution of BitVoy over the long term.
platinum.benefit1Description: High-priority access to exclusive events provides special experience opportunities with preferential conditions over general participation slots.
platinum.benefit2Description: BVC cashback is applied at a high level for transactions and payments.
platinum.benefit3Description: Access to the high-tier draw pool within the Founder-exclusive gacha.
platinum.benefit4Description: For BitVoy tokens and airdrops, you are eligible at a preferential high allocation level.
platinum.benefit5Description: For RWA benefits such as trading cards, events, and experiences, special priority listing on markets and wanted lists is provided.
platinum.benefit6Title: Voting rights on project direction and partners: Extended
platinum.benefit6Description: In votes regarding project direction and partner selection, you can participate with extended influence.
platinum.benefit7Title: Exclusive Platinum title and badge display
platinum.benefit7Description: Platinum Founder-exclusive titles and badges are displayed on your profile, marketplace, and in the community.
platinum.recommended1: Those who value a balance between usability and benefits
platinum.recommended2: Those who want to enjoy Founder benefits without pressure

aurora.title: 🟨 Aurora Founder
aurora.catch: An Entry Founder to Experience BitVoy Early
aurora.description:
Aurora Founder is the standard tier of the Founder Membership.

Receive early member benefits while experiencing BitVoy's services step by step.
aurora.benefit1Description: Priority access to exclusive events provides participation opportunities with preferential conditions over general participation.
aurora.benefit2Description: BVC cashback is applied under preferential conditions for transactions and payments.
aurora.benefit3Description: Access to the priority draw pool of the Founder-exclusive gacha.
aurora.benefit4Description: For BitVoy tokens and airdrops, you are eligible for priority allocation.
aurora.benefit5Description: For RWA benefits such as trading cards, events, and experiences, priority listing on markets and wanted lists is provided.
aurora.benefit6Title: Voting rights on project direction and partners: Granted
aurora.benefit6Description: You can participate in votes regarding project direction and partner selection.
aurora.benefit7Title: Exclusive Aurora title and badge display
aurora.benefit7Description: Aurora Founder-exclusive titles and badges are displayed on your profile, marketplace, and in the community.
aurora.recommended1: Those who want to join as a Founder
aurora.recommended2: Those who want to try the Membership first

crystal.title: 🟩 Crystal Founder
crystal.description:
Crystal Founder is an entry-level tier for those joining BitVoy Membership for the first time.

Join easily and enjoy Founder-exclusive experiences and benefits without pressure.
crystal.benefit1Description: Participation opportunities for exclusive events are provided.
crystal.benefit2Description: BVC cashback is applied for transactions and payments.
crystal.benefit3Description: Access to the participation draw pool of the Founder-exclusive gacha.
crystal.benefit4Description: You are eligible for distribution of BitVoy tokens and airdrops.
crystal.benefit5Description: For RWA benefits such as trading cards, events, and experiences, you are listed on markets and wanted lists as a Founder slot.
crystal.benefit6Title: Voting rights on project direction and partners: Eligible
crystal.benefit6Description: You are eligible to participate in votes regarding project direction and partner selection.
crystal.benefit7Title: Exclusive Crystal title and badge display
crystal.benefit7Description: Crystal Founder-exclusive titles and badges are displayed on your profile, marketplace, and in the community.
crystal.recommended1: Those who want to join while observing first
crystal.recommended2: Those who want to try the Membership

whatIs.title: What is Founder Membership?
whatIs.description: A participatory membership system where you can receive benefits, priority rights, and exclusive experiences in BitVoy Wallet, marketplace, and partner services. A Founder NFT is issued as a participation certificate.
whatIs.statusText:
Current Status: Regular User
Benefits will be unlocked gradually when you join.

benefits.title: Examples of Membership Benefits
benefits.benefit1: Discounts on various fees within BitVoy
benefits.benefit2: Access to Founder / Member exclusive content
benefits.benefit3: Exclusive gacha and priority purchase slots
benefits.benefit4: Boost for referral and affiliate benefits
benefits.note: ※ Benefit contents vary by Membership rank.

howToJoin.title: How to Join
howToJoin.description: BitVoy Membership is activated by obtaining a Founder NFT. A Founder NFT is a participation certificate for Membership and a digital proof to receive benefits. It is a Membership NFT that represents rights and benefits related to service use, not an investment product.

chooseFounder.title: Choose Your Founder Membership
chooseFounder.description: The benefits and experiences you receive differ depending on the rank you join.

faq.title: Answers to Common Concerns
faq.q1: Will benefits increase in the future? → Yes. They will be added as BitVoy grows.
faq.q2: What happens if I stop using it? → Benefits can be checked and used at any time.
faq.q3: Is it okay if I'm not familiar with NFTs? → BitVoy will support purchase and management.
faq.note: ※ A Founder NFT will be issued. ※ There is a limit on the number issued for each rank.

ranks.title: Founder Membership Rank List
ranks.subtitle: Founder NFTs are not investment products, but participation certificates that activate various BitVoy benefits.

cta.title: Choose the Founder Membership That Suits You
cta.note: ※ A Founder NFT will be issued / There is a limit on the number issued for each rank
